dashboard.checkoutCancelDesc: You can try again whenever you want.
dashboard.insightsV1SyncFail: Could not sync; using demo data.

dashboard.partialRefine: Low confidence; refine the prompt if you need accuracy.
dashboard.backendInsightFail: Could not generate insight on the backend

dashboard.detailsNeededTitle: Details needed to create the chart

dashboard.connectionCreatedDesc: The two charts are linked for analysis.
dashboard.connectionSummaryDefault: Correlation analysis between the two charts.
